label: REALGRADE3

groundTruth.fnCandidatesReview: All 9 FN candidates reviewed: new grader correctly rejected old-grader bugs (blank responses, single-char junk, wrong-word answers). Old grader had acceptance bug.
groundTruth.fpCandidatesReview: 16 confirmed FPs from expert review of 257 FP candidates. Key patterns: wrong Korean near-synonyms (색조/nuance, 변화/dynamic), wrong-meaning Korean (exposition/폭로=exposé not exposition), anatomical vs figurative meaning (insular).

metrics.changeDirection: new grader accepts 248 more answers (+31pp net)

verdictReason: 0 false negatives (gate metric); ~96.8% vs ~66.8% old grader accuracy; old grader had massive recall failure (55.7%); new grader correctly handles Korean answers, paraphrases, typos; ~16 confirmed FPs (2%) are edge cases not systematic failures
